ItacPersonItem.Notes: Chigi joined the Umoristi Academy in the 1620s with the nickname Tyrrenum - see Caterina Volpi, `Ritratti di illustri contemporanei nella collezione di Cassiano dal Pozzo`, in I segreti di un collezionista. Exhibition Catalogue, ed. F. Solinas (2001), p. 71. See his biography by Mario Rosa, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
